docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,499.51 FILED BY PARSONS, JACQUELYN AS TO DEFENDANT BERG, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARSONS, JACQUELYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERG, KEVIN $4,160.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,235.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE RE: REQUEST TO "CHANGE OF ADDRES"; RE-SEND A COPY OF "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT" AND FORMS FOR "REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS" . RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT BERG, KEVIN
